title: eRemit — Remittance Automation
body: Full remittance automation with intelligent filtering, policy-level tracking, detailed premium and deduction reporting, and AMS integration. Removes reconciliation friction and reporting overhead for every agent in the network.

title: Agent Application Tracking Portal (AATP)
body: Agent onboarding and lifecycle management from intake through approval, with real-time visibility for agents and sales teams. Turns onboarding from a fragmented, opaque process into a structured, trackable workflow.

title: ATS Newsletter and Knowledge Systems
body: AI education, fraud awareness, and institutional knowledge distributed bi-weekly across 1,744+ agents. Video-embedded, consistently formatted, and scaling as WFG's primary external knowledge channel.

title: MyHome and Current AI — Conversational Intelligence
body: Voice-first and chat-first AI layer for agents and realtors. Captures expert knowledge, builds realtor authority, and is expanding beyond agency side into direct operations and consumer-facing experiences.

title: Deadline Calculator — Transaction Intelligence
body: Automates 16+ critical contract date computations with full federal holiday handling. Supports both cash and financed deals. Removes guesswork from contract management for agency-side and realtor-side users alike.

title: Fraud Detection AI — Risk Intelligence
body: Proactive risk scoring, wire fraud prevention, and FinCEN-aligned detection running across Agency and Direct channels. Surfaces risk before closing and protects against wire fraud and bad actor exposure across the entire WFG network.
